scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/_routes.json','utf8'));const extras=['/journal','/journal/*','/sitemap.xml','/robots.txt'];extras.forEach(p=>{if(!r.exclude.includes(p))r.exclude.push(p);});fs.writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json',JSON.stringify(r,null,2));console.log('_routes.json patched');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('dist/journal/index.html')&&!fs.existsSync('dist/journal.html')){fs.copyFileSync('dist/journal/index.html','dist/journal.html');console.log('dist/journal.html flat file created (eliminates 308 redirect)');}else{console.log('dist/journal.html already exists or journal/index.html missing');}"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
